requirement_topic.en: DOMLEC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and IRC / DOMLEC Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: DOMLEC BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及IRC / DOMLEC并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: DOMLEC BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及IRC / DOMLEC併網要求

summary.en: Dominica's electricity grid is operated exclusively by DOMLEC (Dominica Electricity Services Ltd), a publicly regulated utility operating under licences granted by IRC (Independent Regulatory Commission). All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale renewable-plus-storage projects and behind-the-meter commercial systems — require DOMLEC technical review and grid-connection approval, with IRC oversight. Dominica's grid operates at 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz — sharing the 50 Hz frequency with China but running at a higher nominal voltage (China is 220/380 V). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must therefore be configured and validated for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. DOMLEC has published a Distributed Generation (DG) Interconnection Policy that sets technical requirements for customer-owned generation and storage assets connected to its distribution network; project-scale requirements are defined in individual interconnection agreements. IEC 62933 series standards (Electrical Energy Storage Systems), including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems), are internationally expected references for BESS projects seeking DOMLEC/IRC connection approval. No publicly accessible DOMLEC BESS-specific grid-connection technical specification was confirmed as of the dataset date; direct engagement with DOMLEC and IRC is required at the earliest project stage.
summary.zh: 多米尼克的电网由DOMLEC（多米尼克电力服务有限公司）独家运营，该公司是依据IRC（独立监管委员会）颁发的许可证运营的受监管公用事业企业。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模的可再生能源加储能项目和工商业表后系统——均须在IRC监管下取得DOMLEC技术审查和并网批准。多米尼克电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相230 V / 三相400 V——与中国同为50 Hz，但额定电压更高（中国为220/380 V）。因此，BESS储能变流器（PCS）须针对50 Hz 230/400 V进行配置和验证。DOMLEC已发布分布式发电（DG）并网政策，规定了接入其配电网的客户自有发电和储能资产的技术要求；项目规模要求在个别并网协议中规定。IEC 62933系列标准（电化学储能系统），包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求），是寻求DOMLEC/IRC并网批准的BESS项目的国际预期参考依据。截至本数据集日期，未能确认DOMLEC公开发布专门针对BESS的并网技术规格文件；须在项目最早阶段直接与DOMLEC和IRC接触。
summary.zht: 多米尼克的電網由DOMLEC（多米尼克電力服務有限公司）獨家運營，該公司是依據IRC（獨立監管委員會）頒發的許可證運營的受監管公用事業企業。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模的可再生能源加儲能項目和工商業表後系統——均須在IRC監管下取得DOMLEC技術審查和併網批准。多米尼克電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相230 V / 三相400 V——與中國同為50 Hz，但額定電壓更高（中國為220/380 V）。因此，BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須針對50 Hz 230/400 V進行配置和驗證。DOMLEC已發布分布式發電（DG）併網政策，規定了接入其配電網的客戶自有發電和儲能資產的技術要求；項目規模要求在個別併網協議中規定。IEC 62933系列標準（電化學儲能系統），包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求），是尋求DOMLEC/IRC併網批准的BESS項目的國際預期參考依據。截至本數據集日期，未能確認DOMLEC公開發布專門針對BESS的併網技術規格文件；須在項目最早階段直接與DOMLEC和IRC接觸。

standards_or_laws: DOMLEC Distributed Generation (DG) Interconnection Policy — technical requirements for customer-owned generation and storage assets connected to Dominica distribution network
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
IRC (Independent Regulatory Commission) — regulatory authority for DOMLEC grid-connection approvals in Dominica
Dominica grid parameters: 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). Although Dominica shares the 50 Hz frequency, the voltage differs — Dominica is 230/400 V versus China's 220/380 V. PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and reactive-power regulation parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be reconfigured and retested for Dominica's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid before grid-connection testing and commissioning. GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not recognised by DOMLEC or IRC.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。尽管多米尼克同为50 Hz频率，但电压不同——多米尼克为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数和无功功率调节参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对多米尼克230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行配置和重新测试。GB/T并网证书和NEA审批不被DOMLEC或IRC认可。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。儘管多米尼克同為50 Hz頻率，但電壓不同——多米尼克為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數和無功功率調節參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對多米尼克230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行配置和重新測試。GB/T併網證書和NEA審批不被DOMLEC或IRC認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy DOMLEC/IRC grid-connection requirements in Dominica. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Dominica is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; although the frequency is identically 50 Hz, PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and independently retested for Dominica's grid; (b) DOMLEC DG Interconnection Policy compliance — obtain DOMLEC's current technical requirements before equipment design is finalised, as requirements may evolve with Dominica's growing solar-plus-storage deployment; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project or IRC specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) coastal and hurricane derating — Dominica's tropical maritime climate requires attention to salt-mist corrosion resistance (IEC 60068-2-52 or equivalent) and wind-load design for hurricane-force events (wind speeds exceeding 150 km/h are plausible for Category 3+ storms); enclosures and structural mountings must be designed accordingly; (e) SCADA and communication protocols — confirm DOMLEC's interface protocol requirements for BESS monitoring and dispatch before equipment procurement.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足多米尼克DOMLEC/IRC并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——多米尼克为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；尽管频率同为50 Hz，但PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新配置并针对多米尼克电网进行独立重新测试；（b）DOMLEC分布式发电并网政策合规——在设备设计最终确定前取得DOMLEC现行技术要求，因随多米尼克太阳能加储能部署增加，要求可能持续演变；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目或IRC规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）沿海及飓风降额——多米尼克热带海洋气候要求关注盐雾腐蚀防护（IEC 60068-2-52或等效标准）及针对飓风级别事件的风荷载设计（3级以上飓风风速可超过150 km/h）；外壳和结构安装须相应设计；（e）SCADA及通信协议——在设备采购前确认DOMLEC对BESS监控和调度的接口协议要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足多米尼克DOMLEC/IRC併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——多米尼克為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；儘管頻率同為50 Hz，但PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新配置並針對多米尼克電網進行獨立重新測試；（b）DOMLEC分布式發電併網政策合規——在設備設計最終確定前取得DOMLEC現行技術要求，因隨多米尼克太陽能加儲能部署增加，要求可能持續演變；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目或IRC規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）沿海及颶風降額——多米尼克熱帶海洋氣候要求關注鹽霧腐蝕防護（IEC 60068-2-52或等效標準）及針對颶風級別事件的風荷載設計（3級以上颶風風速可超過150 km/h）；外殼和結構安裝須相應設計；（e）SCADA及通訊協議——在設備採購前確認DOMLEC對BESS監控和調度的接口協議要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOMLEC grid-connection approval under IRC oversight is required for all grid-connected BESS in Dominica; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the DOMLEC interconnection agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Dominica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy DOMLEC/IRC grid-connection requirements in Dominica. Although China and Dominica share 50 Hz, the grid voltage differs (China 220/380 V vs Dominica 230/400 V) — BESS PCS must be re-parameterised and retested for Dominica's 230/400 V grid. Additional Dominica-specific factors include hurricane wind-load design, salt-mist corrosion resistance, and alignment with DOMLEC's DG Interconnection Policy. Engage DOMLEC and IRC at the earliest project stage. No publicly accessible DOMLEC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足多米尼克DOMLEC/IRC并网要求。尽管中国与多米尼克同为50 Hz，但电网电压不同（中国220/380 V vs 多米尼克230/400 V）——BESS储能变流器须重新针对多米尼克230/400 V电网进行参数配置和重新测试。多米尼克的其他特殊因素还包括飓风风荷载设计、盐雾腐蚀防护，以及符合DOMLEC分布式发电并网政策的要求。须在项目最早阶段与DOMLEC和IRC接触。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认DOMLEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足多米尼克DOMLEC/IRC併網要求。儘管中國與多米尼克同為50 Hz，但電網電壓不同（中國220/380 V vs 多米尼克230/400 V）——BESS儲能變流器須重新針對多米尼克230/400 V電網進行參數配置和重新測試。多米尼克的其他特殊因素還包括颶風風荷載設計、鹽霧腐蝕防護，以及符合DOMLEC分布式發電併網政策的要求。須在項目最早階段與DOMLEC和IRC接觸。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認DOMLEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接接觸至關重要。
